name: @buildmate/demo-video-backup
description: Presenter-only Remotion fallback video for BuildMate S1–S3 demo

scripts.render: remotion render src/index.ts BuildMateS1S3Demo out/buildmate-s1-s3-demo.mp4 --browser-executable="/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome"
scripts.still: remotion still src/index.ts BuildMateS1S3Demo out/still.png --scale=0.25 --frame=30 --browser-executable="/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome"
